ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., software development, marketing) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project (e.g., Developer, Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team member belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the team member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task is associated with */,
  "assigned_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member assigned to the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task completion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the task */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time taken to complete the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the communication pertains to */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., Email, Call) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the communication */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who sent the communication */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Name of the person who received the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status (e.g., Project, Task) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact at the client company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the client company is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status change record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which the status was changed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status assigned to the project */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the status change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Software Development, Marketing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_category_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_category_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_category_links_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Team Member, Client) */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member (if applicable) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
